name: Prometheus
description: Connection definition for registering a Prometheus endpoint as a first-class Meshery connection for metrics collection.

url.title: Prometheus Endpoint
url.description: Base URL of the Prometheus server (e.g. http://prometheus.example:9090).

name.title: Connection Name
name.description: Optional friendly name for this Prometheus connection.

secret.title: API Key or Basic Auth
secret.description: API key, or basic-auth credential formatted as username:password, used to query Prometheus.
